prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 20 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.2 kg; Height 151.7 cm; BMI 20.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 5.8%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 226mg/dL; 6 months ago 212mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 47.3kg; 9 months ago 43.1kg; 6 months ago 43.7kg; 3 months ago 42.3kg; current 46.2kg), Height (12 months ago 151.7cm; 9 months ago 151.7cm; 6 months ago 151.7cm; 3 months ago 151.7cm; current 151.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 20.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 141mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 114U/L; 9 months ago 110U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 111U/L; current 117U/L), AST (12 months ago 86U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 85U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 84U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 5.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.2mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 3.8mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 2.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 310mg/g; 9 months ago 398mg/g; 6 months ago 370mg/g; 3 months ago 361mg/g; current 379mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 74mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 148mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.74 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
